name: sofa-recolor-tool
description: LAB color-mode recolor on base sofa photo (batch).

scripts.bali-ref-setup: node -e "import{copyFileSync,existsSync,readdirSync}from'fs';import{join}from'path';const o='output',i='input/Bali-Silk-realism-reference.png';const f=readdirSync(o).filter(x=>x.includes('REALISM-STRESS')&&x.endsWith('.png')).sort().reverse()[0];if(!f)throw new Error('Run npm run bali-stress first');copyFileSync(join(o,f),i);console.log('Wrote',i,'from',f);"
